OUR SOLUTIONS

Comprehensive Orthopedic Solutions

Targeted treatments designed to restore skeletal integrity, relieve joint compression, and accelerate muscular recovery using modern techniques.

Sports Medicine & Arthroscopy

We specialize in restoring movement, treating muscle injuries, ligament tears, and helping athletes return to active sports quickly. Our clinic features specialized sports rehab programs for conditions like Tennis Elbow, Golfer's Elbow, Runner's Knee, and Rotator Cuff injuries.

Services & Reconstructions:

  • Sports Injury Clinic & Rehabilitation
  • Knee & Shoulder Arthroscopy
  • ACL & PCL Reconstruction
  • Meniscus & Cartilage Repair
  • Ligament Reconstruction
Book Consultation

Joint Replacement & Reconstructions

Restore pain-free weight-bearing stability with modular joint replacements. We perform advanced joint reconstructions for degenerated bones using custom-aligned prosthetic components.

Arthroplasty Capabilities:

  • Total Knee & Partial Knee Replacement
  • Total Hip Replacement
  • Shoulder & Elbow Replacement
  • Revision Joint Replacement
Book Consultation

Spine Care & Surgery

Relieve chronic neck and back pain with custom therapeutic and surgical decompression models. Our team specializes in slip disc treatment, sciatica, and scoliosis management.

Spinal Interventions:

  • Back Pain & Neck Pain Treatment
  • Slip Disc & Sciatica Care
  • Spine Trauma & Spine Surgery
  • Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery
  • Cervical & Lumbar Spine Surgery
Book Consultation

Trauma Care & Emergency Orthopedics

Immediate orthopedic surgery and advanced fixation care for complex open fractures, dislocations, and accident trauma. We perform external and internal skeletal stabilization to restore proper anatomical alignment.

Trauma Procedures:

  • Fracture Treatment & Complex Fracture Surgery
  • Open Fractures & Poly Trauma Accident Care
  • Emergency Orthopedics & Bone Fixation
  • External Fixation (including Ilizarov Fixator)
Book Consultation

Hand & Wrist Surgery

Delicate reconstructive microsurgery for nerve entrapments, tendon lacerations, and skeletal finger injuries, returning manual flexibility and full hand function.

Hand Operations:

  • Tendon & Nerve Repair
  • Hand & Wrist Fracture Fixations
  • Finger Injuries & Joint Repairs
  • Carpal Tunnel Surgery
Book Consultation

Foot & Ankle Surgery

Treatment for structural foot deformities, heel friction pain, and ankle ligament injuries. We perform advanced ankle reconstructions and joint preservation procedures.

Foot & Ankle Procedures:

  • Foot Deformities (Flat Foot, Club Foot)
  • Heel Pain & Plantar Fasciitis Release
  • Ankle Ligament Injury & Ankle Arthroscopy
  • Achilles Tendon Injury Repair
Book Consultation

Pediatric Orthopedics

Congenital and childhood bone alignments, pediatric sports injuries, and growing skeletal correction plans.

Childhood Orthopedic Services:

  • Club Foot, Bow Legs & Knock Knees Correction
  • Hip Dysplasia & Cerebral Palsy Care
  • Limb Length Difference & Bone Deformity Correction
  • Pediatric Fractures & Growth Plate Injuries
  • Congenital Bone Disorders & Scoliosis Treatment
Book Consultation

Shoulder & Elbow Care

Relieve rotator cuff impingements, chronic shoulder dislocations, and stubborn muscle group strains. Utilizing high-definition camera arthroscopy and advanced anchor hardware, our clinic repairs complex tears, returning structural balance and natural range-of-motion to your arm.

Surgical & Therapeutic Care:

  • Rotator Cuff Repair & Shoulder Joint Replacement
  • Labral Tear Anchoring & Stability Operations
  • Shoulder & Elbow Replacement & Revisions
  • Tennis Elbow & Golfer's Elbow Tendon Release
Book Consultation

Bone Health Clinic

Diagnosing and treating bone density losses, osteoporosis, and arthritic conditions to protect active mobility and skeletal strength.

Bone Health Services:

  • Osteoporosis Clinic & Arthritis Clinic
  • Rheumatoid Arthritis & Osteoarthritis Programs
  • Bone Density Test (DEXA) & Vitamin D Clinic
Book Consultation

Pain Management & Biologics

Relieving acute and chronic orthopedic joint discomfort using highly targeted biologic therapies and injection blocks.

Pain Clinic Services:

  • PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) Therapy
  • Image-Guided Injection Therapy
  • Joint Pain Clinic (Knee, Shoulder, Back, Neck)
Book Consultation

Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation

Comprehensive post-operative recovery, neuro-rehab, and balance correction exercises designed to guide patients safely back to baseline activity scores.

Rehab Programs:

  • Sports & Stroke Rehabilitation
  • Joint Replacement & Spine Rehabilitation
  • Balance Training, Exercise Therapy & Electrotherapy
  • Home Physiotherapy Visits
Book Consultation
FAQ SUPPORT

Common Surgical Questions

Read explanations regarding pre-op consultations, scheduling, recovery timelines, and surgical guidelines.

Robotic-assisted joint replacement involves utilizing a 3D computerized map of your specific joint structure before surgery. The robotic arm assists the surgeon by providing real-time feedback and limiting movement to highly specific, pre-mapped parameters, ensuring implant alignment within tenths of a millimeter.
Rehabilitation cycles vary based on patient age and surgical complexity. For sports injuries (like an ACL tear) or joint replacements, initial recovery takes 6 to 12 weeks, followed by tailored strength training. A full physical recovery to normal athletic benchmarks is completed in 6 to 9 months.
Absolutely. Pallawi Hospital prioritizes conservative preservation care. We offer non-operative treatments including diagnostic ultrasound mapping, targeted cortisone injections, physical therapy management, brace alignment, and biologic regenerative options.
We accept most major PPO commercial insurance carriers and select private health plans. Since we specialize in high-end, luxury orthopedic care, our administrative concierge team is available to run pre-authorization reviews on your behalf to confirm coverage prior to scheduling diagnostic checkups.
PALLAWI HOSPITAL

Exceptional orthopedic care, children's services, and critical care units in Mancherial, Telangana. Blending clinical brilliance with genuine compassion.
